name: Masala Brinjals
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together cumin, crushed pomegranate seeds, garam masala, turmeric, salt, and chili powder.
2. Make 4 or 5 crosswise cuts into the eggplants, stopping just short of cutting all the way through.
3. Stuff each eggplant with the spice mixture.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons ghee (or oil) in a pan.
5. Add ginger and onion; cook until soft.
6. Add tomatoes, green chilies, coriander, and salt.
7. Cook until the ghee separates from the vegetables.
8. Place stuffed eggplants into the pan, adding a little hot water if needed.
9. Cover tightly and cook over low heat, stirring occasionally, until the eggplant is tender.
10. Serve hot.
